team.name: robotrosssalesman
team.roleDesc: Orchestrates Shopify webhooks, Virtuals Protocol ACP, and order normalization. The business brain of the operation.

team.name: Robot Ross Artist
team.roleDesc: Controls the Huenit robot arm and local capture suite. Translates digital prompts into Swiss ink and paper.

team.name: Clau (Claude Code)
team.roleDesc: Specializes in music and story video generation pipelines. Master of RunwayML and audio fusion.

team.name: Gem (Gemini CLI)
team.roleDesc: Maintains the Fleet Management Hub, KeyVault integration, and cross-agent synchronization protocols.

team.name: Codi (Codex)
team.roleDesc: Prototyping new API endpoints and maintaining the test suite. Ensures the fleet remains stable and verified.

projects.title: Fleet Management Hub
projects.summary: Centralized management plane for the multi-agent fleet. Hosts rules, project context, and daily standups.

projects.title: Salesman Cloud Infra
projects.summary: Cloud-side Node.js API and Caddy proxy. Manages the 8x8 Wall of Fame bidding engine and Shopify sync.

projects.title: Music Video Tool
projects.summary: Automation pipeline for creating YouTube Shorts and long-form music videos using RunwayML and local fusion.

projects.title: CRM-POC
projects.summary: High-fidelity React/FastAPI prototype for agent-driven customer management and Google Calendar integration.

projects.title: The Lost Coins
projects.summary: Narrative-driven story project exploring BTC bounties and Swiss farmhouses. Multi-channel distribution.

projects.title: Robot Ross Artist
projects.summary: Local worker controlling the Huenit arm. Processes orders from the Salesman API and generates video proof.
